hints.text: **50+ small disjoint coverage patches** (densest on the SW coast); all **Gen3 trekker**, often mounted on odd vehicles
Each town has its **own unique Street View vehicle** (red tractor, snowmobile, ATV…) — the best way to ID the exact town
Architecture = small, **colourful, simple wooden houses**, sparsely placed even in cities
Landscape very **barren, treeless, snowy**; mountains/hills + **fjords & coastlines** (nearly all coverage is coastal)
**Boat trekkers** are very common (many different boats)
**Nuuk** = the largest city + a grey car; **Sisimiut** = black snowmobile (overcast); **Ilulissat** = green ATV (sunny)
More towns by vehicle: **Qaqortoq** = red car (sunny, greener); **Tasiilaq** = ATV w/ grey handguards; **Uummannaq** = sharp mountain to the north
